title: Define ACP-shaped AgentSession interface
description: Design and implement the canonical Go session boundary for the host, including typed lifecycle and event modeling for native ion and ACP-backed agents.

logs.msg: Started as the next active architecture task after the mainline transition: define the canonical ACP-shaped AgentSession interface for the Go host.
Mainline transition complete. Session-interface work is now unblocked by repo/layout churn and should define the canonical AgentSession boundary for both NativeIonSession and ACPAgentSession.
